core_mechanism: a biased random walk (discrete-state Markov chain) on a network whose transition probabilities are reweighted by a local node attribute, solved analytically for its stationary occupation distribution and mean first-passage (transit) times between states
brief_reason: The abstract studies a biased random walk with a preferential (attribute-weighted) transition probability and derives exact expressions for the stationary occupation probability and the mean transit time between two nodes, which is precisely a locally-biased Markov-chain first-passage/stationary-state analysis.
